title: Team workload question

posts.author: Jiwon (Jiwon Kim)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I want to manage my team’s workload but as there are many team mates I want to see it by team not by individual. Is there any way that I can do this?
Plus, I noticed that if a team member is not assigned to any task during specific time, then the team member is not shown in the workload widget. Do you know how to list all the team members in the workload widget even if they’re not assigned to any task?

posts.author: SWyble (Sarah Wyble)
posts.cookedHtml: I didn’t see a response or way to vote for this as a function. We would like to be able to see aggregate workloads by team. This would mean seeing one line item in workload that compiles all work for multiple team members. Assigning a “team” to create a line item for that team won’t work because then you won’t have that item assigned to a person (which is more important). However, the workload for a team should include the generic “team” workload as well as all of the individuals’ workloads. Then, over time, you could see which weeks/months were busy for that team. (Also agree that it would be helpful to see a team member even if they don’t have anything assigned.) Thanks!

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Create a feature request using the start a discussion button at the top. Would also like to see this.
